beats.g0a0_1: {HERO} turns toward {G0A0_CHAR}; {TONE_MOTIF}; a first detail snags her attention
beats.g0a0_2: {G0A0_CHAR} offers {HERO} two ways to read it; one is direct and risks notice, the other is patient and lets {THRESHOLD} keep its secret a while
beats.g0a0_3a: the direct approach to {G0A0_CHAR} yields a hard, specific fact that will not sit still in {HERO}'s mind; it points deeper into {THRESHOLD}
beats.g0a0_3b: watching {G0A0_CHAR} from the edges, {HERO} can either fold the observation into what she already knows, or let the late hour and the motion pull her under before she has understood it
beats.g0a0_4: both readings of {G0A0_CHAR} converge on the same small wrongness; {HERO} feels the journey close around it like a held breath
beats.g0a0_5: carrying what {G0A0_CHAR} has told her, {HERO} moves on through the swaying cars toward {GOAL}
beats.g0a0_end: the pull of {G0A0_CHAR} closes over {HERO} before she can hold it; she surfaces later having missed the moment, safe but emptied of the thing she almost understood

beats.g3a1_end: through {G3A1_CHAR} {HERO} does one whole, quiet good thing for another traveler, and the doing of it is enough; the carriage seems to warm a half-degree around her
beats.g3a2_end: through {G3A2_CHAR} {HERO} meets the journey on its own terms and is answered; something long carried is finally set down
beats.n_start: {HERO} boards {THRESHOLD} at {OPENING_MOMENT}; {ENTRANCE}'s clock has already stopped; four ways to read this strange, half-empty train open before her
beats.p1_never_arrives: the first bottleneck, why {THRESHOLD} never seems to arrive; every clock aboard has stopped and {TERMINUS} stays exactly one hour off, no matter how long the night runs
beats.p2_who_passengers: the second bottleneck, who the passengers really are; each traveller seems to be riding for a reason older than tonight, and none of them will say where they first got on
beats.p3_tunnel_choice: the third bottleneck, the choice at {DEADLINE}; {THRESHOLD} slows before {DEADLINE} and {HERO} must decide what she will carry through the dark, and what she will leave
beats.p4_dawn_reveal: the passengers reveal themselves as {DEADLINE_SIGN} touches the peaks; {HERO} understands {THRESHOLD} is a passage and not a route, and that how the night ends is now hers to shape
beats.r_dawn: every route through the night gathers at {DEADLINE_SIGN} bottleneck above {DEADLINE}; the peaks go gold, the passengers are quiet, and the last shape of {HERO}'s journey waits on one final turning
beats.r_peace1: {HERO} gives herself to {R_PEACE_CHAR}; the carriage narrows to this one long, lucid stretch of track before {DEADLINE}
beats.r_peace2: in {R_PEACE_CHAR} there is a smaller door and a larger one; one closes the night early, the other stays open toward {DEADLINE_SIGN}
beats.r_peace3: having chosen {R_PEACE_CHAR}, {HERO} comes level with {DEADLINE_SIGN} coming up over the ridgeline where all the night's threads seem to gather
beats.r_help1: {HERO} gives herself to {R_HELP_CHAR}; the carriage narrows to this one long, lucid stretch of track before {DEADLINE}
beats.r_help2: in {R_HELP_CHAR} there is a smaller door and a larger one; one closes the night early, the other stays open toward {DEADLINE_SIGN}
beats.r_help3: having chosen {R_HELP_CHAR}, {HERO} comes level with {DEADLINE_SIGN} coming up over the ridgeline where all the night's threads seem to gather
beats.r_truth1: {HERO} gives herself to {R_TRUTH_CHAR}; the carriage narrows to this one long, lucid stretch of track before {DEADLINE}
beats.r_truth2: in {R_TRUTH_CHAR} there is a smaller door and a larger one; one closes the night early, the other stays open toward {DEADLINE_SIGN}
beats.r_truth3: having chosen {R_TRUTH_CHAR}, {HERO} comes level with {DEADLINE_SIGN} coming up over the ridgeline where all the night's threads seem to gather
beats.r_leave1: {HERO} gives herself to {R_LEAVE_CHAR}; the carriage narrows to this one long, lucid stretch of track before {DEADLINE}
beats.r_leave2: in {R_LEAVE_CHAR} there is a smaller door and a larger one; one closes the night early, the other stays open toward {DEADLINE_SIGN}
beats.r_leave3: having chosen {R_LEAVE_CHAR}, {HERO} comes level with {DEADLINE_SIGN} coming up over the ridgeline where all the night's threads seem to gather
beats.e_peace_early: the calm {HERO} finds is real but slips through her fingers before {DEADLINE_SIGN}; she arrives unsettled, sure only that she let a moment pass
beats.e_help_early: {HERO} hesitates one beat too long and the hand she meant to take is withdrawn; the traveler rides on alone and so does she
beats.e_truth_early: {HERO} reads half {G3A3_LURE}'s secret and no more; it is enough to know {THRESHOLD} is kind, not enough to know why it chose her
beats.e_leave_early: the door opens onto the first {ENTRANCE} of all, and {HERO} wakes there as {THRESHOLD} pulls away northward without her, the night unspent
beats.r_choice_peace: {HERO} stops trying to arrive; she lets {TERMINUS} stay one hour off forever and finds, at last, that she does not mind the distance
beats.r_choice_help: the seat beside the mourning traveler is warm; {HERO} can stay through {DEADLINE} at the price of her own arrival, or step back and keep it
beats.r_choice_truth: {HERO} speaks {TERMINUS}'s whole quiet truth aloud to the grey window, and the naming of it is its own kind of arrival
beats.r_choice_safe: {HERO} asks {THRESHOLD} for nothing but a safe waking, and {THRESHOLD}, being kinder than she feared, grants exactly that and no more
beats.e_make_peace: the best ending: {HERO} rides {THRESHOLD} with open eyes and an open heart, at peace with a journey that was never meant to end at a station; {DEADLINE_SIGN} holds and she is finally, wholly here
beats.e_help_passenger: {HERO} stays beside the mourning traveler through {DEADLINE} and delivers her safely into {DEADLINE_SIGN}; helping another home turns out to be the arrival {HERO} was riding toward all along
beats.e_help_cost: {HERO} stays past every reasonable hour and {DEADLINE_SIGN} slips by; the traveler is helped but {HERO} surfaces frayed and far from herself, the good deed shadowed by what it cost
beats.e_uncover_truth: {HERO} names {TERMINUS} for what it is, a passage the season lends to travelers who are ready; she does not stay, but she leaves knowing, and the knowing settles something in her
beats.e_unsettled_safe: {HERO} wakes at her own quiet station, unharmed and a little haunted; {THRESHOLD} is gone, the night unexplained, and she carries only the sense of a door she chose not to walk through

titles.g2a1_end: The Ink Runs in the Cold
titles.e_help_early: The Hand You Did Not Take
titles.g2a3_end: No One Will Meet Your Eye
titles.g0a1_end: A Door You Did Not Open
